CustomField.formula: IF(!ISBLANK(Image_URL__c), HYPERLINK(Image_URL__c + $Organization.Id, IMAGE(Image_URL__c + $Organization.Id , "", (VALUE(LEFT(Image_Ratio__c, FIND("X", Image_Ratio__c) - 1))), (VALUE(RIGHT(Image_Ratio__c, LEN(Image_Ratio__c) - FIND("X", Image_Ratio__c)))) ), "_self") , "") + IF(ISBLANK(Image_URL__c), IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/NoPhoto.png", "" , 100, 100), "")
CustomField.label: Image
